streams.pump_role: single feed stream containing all reagents premixed in DES
streams.reasoning: From Chemistry Plan stream_logic: All reagents premixed in single DES solution. Phenylacetylene must be present when nitrile oxide generates to prevent dimerization. Concentration reduced from batch 0.5 M to 0.067 M based on engineering calculations for optimal heat/mass transfer.

mixing_order_reasoning: From Chemistry Plan: Single stream design - all reagents dissolved in DES before entering heated reactor. No mixing required as nitrile oxide generation and cycloaddition occur sequentially in the heated coil.
pre_reactor_steps: Heat feed reservoir to 40-50°C to reduce DES viscosity from ~50 cP to manageable pumping levels
post_reactor_steps: Collect product stream directly - no quench required as per Chemistry Plan (99% conversion achieved, no persistent reactive intermediates)
chemistry_notes: Thermal 1,3-dipolar cycloaddition in DES. Rate-limiting step is nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate at 120°C, followed by immediate [3+2] cycloaddition with phenylacetylene. Engineering calculations show Da = 19.7 (mass-transfer limited) and Pe = 17 (significant axial dispersion) - reactor behaves closer to CSTR than PFR but still achieves good conversion. DES viscosity requires feed heating. BPR mandatory to prevent degassing and maintain system pressure above EG boiling concerns.

reasoning_per_field.residence_time_min: Engineering calculation estimated 1.5 min (range 1.0-2.2 min) based on 10× intensification factor from batch 15 min. No analogies available - using calculation result.
reasoning_per_field.flow_rate_mL_min: Engineering calculation: Q_total = V_R / τ = 0.75 mL / 1.5 min = 0.500 mL/min. Single stream so this is stream A flow rate.
reasoning_per_field.temperature_C: Same as batch 120°C - required for nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate as per Chemistry Plan mechanism.
reasoning_per_field.concentration_M: Engineering calculation reduced from batch 0.5 M to 0.067 M for optimal reactor performance (C_reactor from calculations).
reasoning_per_field.BPR_bar: Engineering calculation: BPR REQUIRED at 5.0 bar. Gas-liquid system detected - mandatory to maintain gas solubility and prevent uncontrolled degassing.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_type: Chemistry Plan specifies coil reactor for thermal reaction. Engineering calculation confirms coil design with L = 0.95 m.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_material: PFA chosen for high temperature (120°C) compatibility and chemical resistance to DES. Not photochemistry so transparency not required.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_ID_mm: Engineering calculation specifies d = 1.00 mm for optimal heat transfer and pressure drop.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_volume_mL: Engineering calculation: V_R = 0.75 mL based on residence time and flow rate requirements.
reasoning_per_field.wavelength_nm: Chemistry Plan confirms no light required - purely thermal reaction. Set to null.
reasoning_per_field.deoxygenation_method: Chemistry Plan confirms not oxygen sensitive - reaction proceeds in air. Set to null.
